lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to validate the AX loadout, the four-utility kit and the power/capacitor budget for Gauss.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Federal Assault Ship page — manufacturer specs, hull/armour figures, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, military-slot count and module-variant data behind the AX reinforcement plan.

sources.label: Inara — Federal Assault Ship
sources.what: Ship overview: base stats, internals layout, hardpoints, price, and the Federal Chief Petty Officer rank requirement.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki
sources.what: Federal Assault Ship hull profile and flight characteristics, cross-referenced against AX weapon class limits (no huge mount).
